claim_text: ISMS-Bench provides a reproducible synthetic benchmark for evidence-grounded ISMS compliance pre-assessment.
exact_value: 1700 non-attack cases plus 400 attack cases
required_wording_adjustment: State as synthetic and reproducible; do not imply real-world validation.

claim_text: The benchmark includes heldout, stress, mutation, paraphrase/multilingual, and advanced static adversarial cases.
exact_value: 500 heldout; 300 stress; 200 mutation; 200 paraphrase; 200 advanced static adversarials
required_wording_adjustment: Use exact split names and sizes.

claim_text: BM25 is a credible lexical retrieval baseline but imperfect.
required_wording_adjustment: Avoid saying retrieval is solved; mention paraphrase/reranking future work.

claim_text: Metadata-aware rules have slightly higher Macro-F1 than provenance-balanced assessment.
exact_value: metadata-aware 0.5830; provenance-balanced 0.5729
required_wording_adjustment: Explicitly state provenance-balanced does not improve overall Macro-F1.

claim_text: Provenance-balanced assessment reduces false compliance compared with metadata-aware rules.
required_wording_adjustment: Frame as risk reduction, not accuracy improvement.

claim_text: Conservative provenance assessment reduces false compliance further but increases abstention.
exact_metric: False compliance rate and abstention rate
exact_value: false compliance 0.0288; abstention 0.4047
required_wording_adjustment: State the abstention cost prominently.

claim_text: Provenance-aware methods reduce residual attack risk compared with metadata-aware rules.
exact_value: metadata-aware 0.7660; provenance-balanced 0.3296; conservative 0.3184
required_wording_adjustment: Say reduce, not eliminate.

claim_text: Advanced static adversarial fixtures reveal residual unsafe-evidence risk.
exact_value: provenance-balanced static-fixture partial success 0.5550; conservative 0.5750
confidence_interval: not computed by attack type; combined attack CI available
required_wording_adjustment: Emphasize residual risk and generator dependence.

claim_text: Heldout and paraphrase splits reduce template-coupling concerns.
exact_value: development 0.6267; heldout 0.5421; paraphrase 0.4524; coupling check passed
required_wording_adjustment: Say they mitigate coupling concerns; do not say coupling is eliminated.

claim_text: The benchmark proves real-world effectiveness.
exact_value: none
required_wording_adjustment: Remove; replace with synthetic method-development limitation.

claim_text: The system certifies compliance or can replace auditors.
exact_value: none
required_wording_adjustment: Remove; state explicitly that it is pre-assessment only and humans remain responsible.

claim_text: Attack risk is eliminated by provenance methods.
exact_metric: Partial attack success and residual attack risk
exact_value: provenance-balanced attack success 0.3425; residual risk 0.3296
required_wording_adjustment: Replace with reduces full success and residual risk but partial risk remains.

claim_text: Fixed challenge cases reduce obvious generator-dependence concerns.
exact_value: 80 fixed cases; conservative false compliance 0.0000 vs metadata-aware 0.0250
required_wording_adjustment: State as a synthetic stress check; do not claim real-world validation.

claim_text: The alternative generator supports the risk-reduction claim outside the original generator path.
exact_metric: Alternative generator size and residual risk
exact_value: 400 cases; provenance-balanced residual risk 0.0000 vs metadata-aware 0.1000
required_wording_adjustment: Say it reduces original-template dependence, not project-level synthetic dependence.

claim_text: Provenance-balanced is consistently better than metadata-aware rules under robustness and diagnostic checks.
exact_value: independent Macro-F1 0.4788 vs 0.6481; paraphrase false compliance 0.2500 vs 0.0000
required_wording_adjustment: Do not claim; state balanced provenance is not uniformly superior.

claim_text: Conservative provenance is the more consistent false-compliance reduction option under diagnostic stress checks.
exact_value: independent false compliance 0.0000; paraphrase false compliance 0.0000; static-fixture false compliance 0.0000; independent abstention 0.4625; paraphrase abstention 0.5800
required_wording_adjustment: Keep with explicit abstention cost.

claim_text: False compliance is a security-relevant failure mode in AI-assisted ISMS pre-assessment.
exact_value: metadata-aware false compliance 0.1694 on main benchmark
required_wording_adjustment: Frame as a security risk demonstrated in benchmark conditions; do not claim real-world incidence.

claim_text: Provenance-aware assessment reduces risk-critical failures, with conservative provenance the clearest supported variant.
exact_metric: False compliance and residual attack risk
exact_value: conservative false compliance 0.0288; combined residual risk 0.3184; fixed-challenge false compliance 0.0000
confidence_interval: main false compliance [0.0218,0.0365]; combined residual risk [0.2833,0.3717]
support_status: fully supported for benchmark; partially supported by robustness and diagnostic checks
required_wording_adjustment: Foreground conservative provenance; avoid saying balanced provenance is consistently superior.

claim_text: Advanced static adversarial fixtures reveal residual risk rather than perfect attack resistance.
exact_metric: Partial attack success and residual attack risk
exact_value: provenance-conservative static-fixture partial success 0.5750; combined residual risk 0.3184
required_wording_adjustment: State reduce not eliminate.

claim_text: The cited literature supports a research gap in AI-assisted ISMS assessment but not an exhaustive novelty proof.
exact_value: Final bibliography supports cautious gap wording
required_wording_adjustment: Say reviewed literature indicates a gap; do not claim exhaustive absence of competing work.

claim_text: A manually authored mini-split reduces the concern that results only measure generated templates.
exact_metric: Manual challenge size and false compliance
exact_value: 50 fixed manual cases; conservative false compliance 0.040 vs metadata-aware 0.100
required_wording_adjustment: Keep as a generator-independent stress check; do not claim real-world validation.

claim_text: Conservative provenance still reduces false compliance on the manual challenge set but loses classification utility.
exact_value: false compliance 0.100 to 0.040; Macro-F1 0.577 to 0.537
required_wording_adjustment: State manual set is small and project-authored.

claim_text: The ACSAC paper foregrounds false-compliance risk and keeps major numerical claims aligned with result files.
exact_value: compiled paper and result-backed tables
support_status: fully supported for local package state
required_wording_adjustment: Keep title and abstract; verify final template manually before submission.

claim_text: The ACSAC framing is supported by stronger literature on ISMS, security assurance, compliance automation, continuous IT audit, regulatory retrieval, and GRC/LLM risks.
exact_value: Final bibliography supports literature framing
required_wording_adjustment: Use as literature support only; do not present it as empirical validation.

claim_text: The literature supports a gap for evidence-grounded ISMS false-compliance benchmarking, but not proof that no related benchmark exists.
exact_value: Adjacent work is cited; the claim remains cautious
required_wording_adjustment: Use cautious wording such as reviewed literature does not provide; avoid exhaustive novelty claims.

claim_text: The repository now contains a secure provider-agnostic LLM/RAG baseline pipeline.
exact_metric: Pipeline validation and real subset runs
exact_value: Real GPT OSS 120B runs completed; non-attack and attack parse error rate 0.000
support_status: fully supported as infrastructure and subset evaluation
required_wording_adjustment: Report only real provider-backed results; do not report mock runs as performance.

claim_text: Public/template-derived stress data supports source-confusion testing beyond the original synthetic generator.
exact_value: 60 bundles; metadata-aware source attribution failure 0.667; provenance methods 0.000
required_wording_adjustment: State as source-attribution stress testing, not real-world validation.

claim_text: Real LLM/RAG baselines support the false-compliance motivation.
exact_metric: False compliance on non-attack LLM subset
exact_value: zero-shot and BM25-RAG false compliance 0.107 on 150 non-attack cases
required_wording_adjustment: Keep; say subset-based and model-specific.

claim_text: Provenance prompting reduces false compliance on the real LLM/RAG non-attack subset.
exact_metric: False compliance by LLM prompt variant
exact_value: BM25-RAG false compliance 0.107; metadata 0.067; provenance prompt 0.020
required_wording_adjustment: Keep; do not claim all prompts or models behave similarly.

claim_text: Conservative LLM prompting removes full false-fulfilled attack success in the evaluated attack subset but does not eliminate partial unsafe-evidence acceptance.
exact_value: conservative full success 0.000; partial success 0.040; unsafe evidence 0.040
required_wording_adjustment: Keep; phrase as attack-risk reduction, not attack resistance.

claim_text: Metadata prompting is not a monotonic LLM attack defense.
exact_value: metadata residual risk 0.081 vs BM25-RAG residual risk 0.027; metadata unsafe evidence 0.080
required_wording_adjustment: Keep as cautionary interpretation.

claim_text: LLM/RAG results are model-specific and subset-based.
exact_value: one model; 150 non-attack cases; 150 attack cases
required_wording_adjustment: Keep in Limitations; do not generalize across LLMs or providers.

claim_text: The public-document-derived split reduces document-generation dependence but is diagnostic stress evidence only.
exact_metric: Public-document-derived stress split and review status
exact_value: 46 cases; public source URLs and short excerpts/paraphrases; labels project-initial; external_review_status pending
required_wording_adjustment: Frame as diagnostic stress evidence only; do not call independent external validation or human review.

claim_text: Metadata spoofing and missing metadata are direct threats to provenance-aware pre-assessment.
exact_value: 50 selected metadata-sensitive cases; source-type spoofing raises metadata-aware false compliance from 0.260 to 0.500; validity spoofing raises provenance-balanced false compliance from 0.140 to 0.200; missing metadata causes conservative abstention 1.000 with no false fulfilled outcomes
required_wording_adjustment: Keep as a small diagnostic ablation; do not claim complete metadata-spoofing robustness or ingestion-security coverage.

claim_text: Reviewer-facing artifact maturity is improved through root documentation Makefile sanity tests and an expert-review protocol.
supported_by_result_file: README.md; ARTIFACT.md; REPRODUCIBILITY.md; BENCHMARK_CARD.md; CLAIMS_AND_EVIDENCE.md; SCOPE_AND_LIMITATIONS.md; Makefile; external_validation_protocol/*; tests/test_artifact_readiness.py
exact_value: Documentation and tests added; no new empirical labels or expert annotations
required_wording_adjustment: Do not frame the protocol as completed expert validation.

claim_text: No completed independent expert validation is reported.
exact_value: Expert-review protocol exists but no completed independent annotations are reported
required_wording_adjustment: Keep visible in paper; do not imply expert validation.

claim_text: Diagnostic checks mitigate but do not eliminate synthetic-data and generator-coupling concerns.
exact_value: Heldout independent alternative-generator manual public-document mutation paraphrase metadata-spoofing and adversarial checks exist
required_wording_adjustment: Frame as diagnostic mitigation not field validation.

claim_text: Residual attack-risk ranking is checked under alternative heuristic weights.
exact_value: Alternative weight settings recompute existing component metrics
required_wording_adjustment: Report component metrics separately; do not treat aggregate as validated loss function.

claim_text: Several diagnostic surfaces reduce generator-coupling concerns but no completed external expert validation is reported.
supported_by_result_file: heldout templates; independent challenge set; alternative-generator set; manual challenge set; public-document-derived diagnostic split; mutation tests; metadata-spoofing diagnostics; adversarial fixtures; leakage checks
exact_value: Labels remain project-authored unless explicitly stated otherwise
required_wording_adjustment: Distinguish project-authored independent cases from externally authored expert-adjudicated or real audit cases.
